title: Leetcode 733. Flood Fill
shortDescription: Given an m×n grid and a starting pixel (sr, sc), repaint all 4-directionally connected cells that have the same color as the starting pixel to the new color and return the updated image. If the new color equals the starting pixel's original color, leave the image unchanged.

Leetcode 733. Flood Fill

Given an m×n grid and a starting pixel (sr, sc), repaint all 4-directionally connected cells that have the same color as the starting pixel to the new color and return the updated image. If the new color equals the starting pixel's original color, leave the image unchanged.
